static mut COUNTER: u64 = 0;
static mut GLOBAL_BUFFER: Vec<u8> = Vec::new();

fn increment_counter() {
    unsafe {
        COUNTER += 1;
    }
}

fn get_counter() -> u64 {
    unsafe { COUNTER }
}

fn append_to_buffer(data: &[u8]) {
    unsafe {
        GLOBAL_BUFFER.extend_from_slice(data);
    }
}

fn process_batch(items: &[u64]) {
    for item in items {
        unsafe {
            COUNTER += item;
        }
    }
}

fn main() {
    increment_counter();
    append_to_buffer(b"hello");
    process_batch(&[1, 2, 3]);
    println!("counter: {}", get_counter());
}
